results.title: Why Patek Philippe Nautilus Watches Are So Rare, Expensive, and Hard to Find
results.description: There are luxury watches, and then there are watches that seem to live in a different universe entirely. The Patek Philippe Nautilus belongs to that second group. It is not just admired because it is beautifully made, or because it carries one of the most respected names in Swiss watchmaking. It is admired because it...
